label: Ad Revenue Degradation
description: Agents do not see ads — ad revenue severely degraded even without cost optimization

causal_translation.trigger_text: Your primary revenue is advertising under delegated agents.
causal_translation.rule_text: Even non-cost-optimizing agents do not render ads the way browsers do.
causal_translation.shift_text: Ad revenue reduced to residual brand sponsorship levels.
causal_translation.effect_text: Ad revenue at 8% of baseline — only indirect sponsorship value remains.
